text_zh: 完美且太棒了，刚接触这个，希望能变得更好，好吗
reply_original: Welcome to Fantasia! We are thrilled to hear you're having a fantastic start. Since you are new, we hope you enjoy exploring all the characters. We are constantly working on updates to make your experience even better. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to email us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 欢迎来到 Fantasia！听说你有一个美妙的开始，我们感到非常高兴。作为新用户，希望你喜欢探索所有的角色。我们一直在努力进行更新，以让你的体验变得更好。如果你有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。祝你玩得开心！
